title: CLK_POLARITY set 0 for memrd and memwr cells on inferred memory
body:
Yosys does not detect that operations happen on posedge (CLK_POLARITY = 0).  Also, appears to be async operation (CLK_ENABLE = 0).

## Steps to reproduce the issue

Below is a small test case.

Note that I modeled the write and read ports following comments in `verilog_backend.cc`.

~~~~
module dpram(rclk, ren, radr, rdat, wclk, wen, wadr, wdat);
input         rclk;
input         ren;
input  [4:0]  radr;
output [31:0] rdat;
input         wclk;
input         wen;
input  [4:0]  wadr;
input  [31:0] wdat;

reg [31:0] memory[0:31];

always @(posedge wclk)
  if (wen)
    memory[wadr] <= wdat;

reg [DBITS-1:0] rdat_tmp;

always @(posedge rclk)
   if (ren) rdat_tmp <= memory[radr];
assign rdat = dat_tmp;

endmodule
~~~~

This is the output that I see from initial proc pass.  Future opt and memory passes do not change what is wrong.

~~~~
  cell $memrd $memrd$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:24$7
    parameter \ABITS 5
    parameter \CLK_ENABLE 0 // <-- why 0?
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 0 // <-- why 0?
    parameter \MEMID "\\memory"
    parameter \TRANSPARENT 0
    parameter \WIDTH 6
    connect \ADDR \radr
    connect \CLK 1'x <-- why?
    connect \DATA $memrd$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:24$7_DATA
    connect \EN 1'x <-- wrong
  end

  attribute \src "../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:18"
  cell $memwr $memwr$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:18$8
    parameter \ABITS 5
    parameter \CLK_ENABLE 0 // <-- why 0?
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 0 // <-- why 0?
    parameter \MEMID "\\memory"
    parameter \PRIORITY 8
    parameter \WIDTH 6
    connect \ADDR $memwr$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:18$1_ADDR
    connect \CLK 1'x
    connect \DATA $memwr$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:18$1_DATA
    connect \EN $memwr$\memory$../VerilogDesign_dpram/dpram.v:18$1_EN
  end
~~~~

## Expected behavior

CLK_ENABLE = 1 for both ports
CLK_POLARITY = 1 for both ports
EN set for read port
CLK set for write port

## Actual behavior

(inverse of above)

CLK_ENABLE = 0 for both ports
CLK_POLARITY = 0 for both ports
EN not set for read port
CLK nto set for write port
